ItemFilter.description: Merged multi-build filter, contains following builds: Anurok Frogs Beastmaster, Ballista Falconer, Bladestorm Bladedancer, Lightning Blast Runemaster, Shadow Cascade Bladedancer, Warpath Void Knight

Rule.nameOverride: All Items

Condition.RuneFilterFlags: RuneOfAscendance RuneOfCreation RuneOfWeaving RuneOfHavoc RuneOfRedemption RuneOfEvolution RuneOfCorruption

Rule.nameOverride: Important Runes
Important Glyphs
Woven Echoes

Condition.NonEquippableItemFilterFlags: LizardTails HarbingerEye PrimordialMaterials TemporalKeystone MerchantToken CrystallizedHeart

Rule.nameOverride: Keys & Currency
